feed.title: What If?
feed.subtitle: Let's fucking do something really interesting

entry.title: Relax topic(1) -- The involution and game theory
entry.content:
This "Relax topic" just something i think it interesting and it's my original.

So...the first artical I want to discuss the "Involution" of China. If you are a Zhihu user, I belive you will often find there are many guy talk about this "Involution". But what this fucking stuff come from?
This word come from biology(I guess). And now it always be used to describe a situation that everyone working very very hard but everyone's life not getting better but even getting worse. WHAT FUCK? But they told me if i work hard, it will be a better future. YES, there are better future, but...consider you may suddenly dead in your work or going to prison becouse you don't want to have a extra work(Yes, I'm talking about you mother fucker ALBB and HW, KISS MY SHINE METAL ASS), even there are better future, you really think you can get it?
No, you can never get there. Acturally, the origin of "Involution" just come from those guy work too hard.
imagine a simple world only have two kind of people: Boss and Employee. At the begining, the employee only have to work 8 hours a day, and they get 5$ a day. And boss also get 5$ a day. And one day, a employee work 9 hours a day, and he get 5.5.That′sright,Iguess,youworkharderyougetmore.Andeveryonewanttogetmore,that′salsoright.Sonextday,10employeework9hoursaday,theyallget5.5. That's right, I guess, you work harder you get more. And every one want to get more, that's also right. So next day, 10 employee work 9 hours a day, they all get 5.5.That′sright,Iguess,youworkharderyougetmore.Andeveryonewanttogetmore,that′salsoright.Sonextday,10employeework9hoursaday,theyallget5.5. After a week, all employee work 9 hours they all get 5.5$ a day, and boss get 6$ a day. And then, interesting thing came. Boss announce, now you all work 9hours a day, so it can't count as an extra work, but you can get a raise salary, you get 5.1$ a day. After that, employee get 5.1$ a day for 9 hours work. And boss get 100$ a day. Untill one day, a employee work 10 hours a day......
At the end of this story, every employee work 16hours a day and get 7$ and the boss? He can get 1000000$ a day, and do nothing.
So i guess what we can learn from this story is:

entry.title: Dynamic structure network 7 -- The growing process
entry.content:
After baby training stop, our network will start waiting for the new dataset, then the growing training will start. Growing training is the main part of class increase process. Our growing process can base on the "activeness" of every node. So in this artical we will discuss about how backprop, forwardprop and node growing work.
To start this discussion, we have to introduce two concept: "Universal approximation theorem" and "No free lunch". The "universal approximation theorem" imply that neural networks can represent a wide variety of interesting functions when given appropriate weights. That's means whatever what kinds of function we try to learn, a huge network can certainly finish this job. But our algorithm still have possibility to fail. Becouse the optimize algorithm may not find the parameters. Also becouse the "no free lunch", there are no perfect algorithm.
After that, let's take a look at this function in artical 3:

L=LB+λ2∑Fi(wi−w∗A,i)2L = L_B + \frac{\lambda}{2}\sum{F_i(w_i - {w^*}_{A, i})^2} L=LB​+2λ​∑Fi​(wi​−w∗A,i​)2

In this function, Fi(wi−w∗A,i)2)F_i(w_i - {w^*}_{A, i})^2)Fi​(wi​−w∗A,i​)2) means the "Changeable" of a node. And this function is try to minimize the change of every node. But this way will have a negative influence in the accuracy of both old class and new class. And the network structure may also have a problem of the new class. So we can use a growing process to fix this two problem. (this part may have change after test finish)

There are two part of our network can growing: nodes and edges. The growing rules are base on the "Activeness" of every node. So, now we define the "Activeness" of node iii as ai=∑wija_i = \sum{w_ij}ai​=∑wi​j. If ai>αa_i > \alphaai​>α, a new node will add into the side of node iii and if ai>βa_i > \betaai​>β a new egde will add into this node. Or another plan is when the Changeable is too large that's means this node is fit this class and old class, that when this network needs to growing. The growing is very simple a new connection will add into this same connect relation with this node and the new node will keep weight wiw_iwi​ the old node will be frozen during this training. And when the Changeable is too small that's means this node is not fit to this class, so we can cross this node and frozen this node and related connection.
And the update of w′i{w'}_iw′i​ and b′j{b'}_jb′j​ just use:

w′i=wi−α1+λSwiL˙wi˙{w'}_i = w_i - \frac{\alpha}{1 + \lambda {S^w}_i}\frac{\dot{L}}{\dot{w_i}} w′i​=wi​−1+λSwi​α​wi​˙​L˙​

b′i=bi−α1+λSbiL˙bi˙{b'}_i = b_i - \frac{\alpha}{1 + \lambda {S^b}_i}\frac{\dot{L}}{\dot{b_i}} b′i​=bi​−1+λSbi​α​bi​˙​L˙​

There also some other thought about the plasticity of network. I was read a paper about how human brain become less plasticity. It said when brain continue learning, the plasticity will more and more lower, so we use forget to keep our plasticity. But I think brain have such system just becouse our brain can't have a increase when we get older. So for our network, I think it may better if we make it keep some blank part and made this part have a certain proportion in our network.
As for the forwardprop and backprop, even we basicly abouden the layer structure, but I think it can still work, or if it can't, we will find a new method.
(This part was not tested, so it just a test plan I will test this part soon.)

entry.title: Dynamic structure network 6 -- How should we initialize our network?
entry.content:
As last artical said, the simple initialize structure will made network overfitting when structure adaptive training. But it obvious, if the first time training make our network overfitting, the increase training will run into a great obstruction.
So now we have to find a way to overcome the overfitting during training or give our network a complex initialize structure.
For my opinion, we can have them both.

(I want them all !!)
Now we can split the training process into two part. The first called "Baby Training" and the second part called "Growing Training".
Baby Training's main job is training with the Dataset1. This part will just like Cascade-Correlation network. Before training start, we only get input layer and output layer. After training, we random remove some of the connect. Then we will get the initialize structure of our network.
Until now, our training process is clear. We will discuss some detail on next artical.

entry.title: Dynamic structure network 5 -- Self Organizing and Structure Adaptive
entry.content:
Self organizing neural network was proposed in 1976 to generate a mappings from high dimensional to lower dimensional. These mappings are able to preserve neighborhood relations in the input data and have the property to represent regions of high signal density on correspondingly large parts of the topological structure.
The (k + 1 ) vertices of the simplex are the cells (or neurons). The (k + 1 )k/2 edges denote topological neighborhood relations. During a self-organization process described further below new cells will be added to the network and superfluous cells will be removed.
And the structure adaptive was proposed in 1990 with the topic of Cascade-Correlation network. When the structure adaptive network start trainning, it not only concern about the weight of every node and threshold, but also try to find the best structure of network to adaptive the input data.
The Cascade-Correlation network is very obvious with "structure adaptive". When the training bigin, this network only get the input layer and the output layer. When training start, the new node will add into this network and other node will not be change. This process is "cascade". And the "correlation" is try to maximize the magnitude between the new node and the network error.
So our work is related with the structure adaptive, but unlike the Cascade-Correlation becouse if we init the network with such simple sturcture, as the paper said, our network will easily overfitting and when the first dataset overfitting it will hard to another dataset 's training process.

entry.title: Dynamic structure network 4 -- What kind of struct should we use ?
entry.content:
This article will discussion about the struct of our dynamic network.
I think the network can simple divid into three part:

  1. The input block
  2. The memory block
  3. The output block
    As for the type of neuron I said in the previous article, we temporary confirm there will only one variety. Becouse make the neuron different is bad of the expandability.
    About the three block of our network:
  4. -- The input block
    This block will used to deal with the diffierent kinds of data, extract there feature, than put them(the feature) into memory block to learn. And this part will have a dynamic connect with the memory block, when a node of memory block have a high "vitality", it will completely not connect with input block.
  5. -- The memory block
    This block is the main part of our network, the "dynamic" mostly means this block have a regular change. Becouse this part is maintain the memory function of network, just like the cerebral cortex(Just maybe, I have to say I'm not a good biology student).
  6. -- The output block
    This block is just like the traditional neuron network, but it can add new node of new class.

This article will just a simple intorduction of the dynamic network sturcture, we will make a detailed discussion in another article.
And so far, the problem in the second article all have a general outline.

entry.title: Dynamic structure network 3 -- Catastrophic forget
entry.content:
The first time I start pay attention to Dynamic Graph network was I try to find a way to solve the catastrophic forget problem in continu learning(or class-increment learning).
The catastrophic forget is when continu learning begin and the data of new class input, the network will forget the old class. It's becouse the softmax function is more bias to the new class. That's why when we train a deep learning model we should mix all class together but can't just put in as queue.So many paper try to find a good way to mix the data of old class and new class. Most of them is try find the feature of old class than mix with new class. I have to say this way is useable but it just treat the symptoms but not the root cause.
I think the root of this problem is the neural. When the new class data input, the neural will start updata the parameter and after that, this neural's parameter will lost the relationship with the old class. So we have to find a methed to keep the information of old class. In 2020 a paper have solve this problem with a study of animal's nervous system.
In this paper, following the logic of the elastic weight consolidation method (EWC), each connection weight wiw_iwi​ in the NN is matched by its “significance” for the skill acquired during training on the first training set A. The “significance” of the weight w i shows how much the change of the weight wiw_iwi​ will be penalized when training on the next training set B. That is, a change in the weight of w i is penalized the more, the more its “significance” is.
So, this paper give the loss function as

L=LB+λ2∑Fi(wi−w∗A,i)2L = L_B + \frac{\lambda}{2}\sum{F_i(w_i - {w^*}_{A, i})^2} L=LB​+2λ​∑Fi​(wi​−w∗A,i​)2

Then it replace the FiF_iFi​ (fisher information matrix) with SwA,i{S^w}_{A, i}SwA,i​ and SbA,i{S^b}_{A, i}SbA,i​ this two thing is:

SwA,i=1n∑∣xk,iwA,i∣{S^w}_{A, i} = \frac{1}{n}\sum{|x_{k, i} w_{A, i}|} SwA,i​=n1​∑∣xk,i​wA,i​∣

SbA,i=1n∑∣yk,i∣{S^b}_{A, i} = \frac{1}{n}\sum{|y_{k, i}|} SbA,i​=n1​∑∣yk,i​∣

So, the loss function become:

L=LB+λ2∑SwA,i(wi−w∗A,i)2+λ2∑SbA,j(bj−b∗A,j)2L = L_B + \frac{\lambda}{2}\sum{{S^w}_{A, i} (w_i - {w^*}_{A, i})^2} + \frac{\lambda}{2}\sum{{S^b}_{A, j} (b_j - {b^*}_{A, j})^2} L=LB​+2λ​∑SwA,i​(wi​−w∗A,i​)2+2λ​∑SbA,j​(bj​−b∗A,j​)2

After that, they update the w′i{w'}_iw′i​ and b′j{b'}_jb′j​ become:

w′i=wi−α1+λSwiL˙wi˙{w'}_i = w_i - \frac{\alpha}{1 + \lambda {S^w}_i}\frac{\dot{L}}{\dot{w_i}} w′i​=wi​−1+λSwi​α​wi​˙​L˙​

b′i=bi−α1+λSbiL˙bi˙{b'}_i = b_i - \frac{\alpha}{1 + \lambda {S^b}_i}\frac{\dot{L}}{\dot{b_i}} b′i​=bi​−1+λSbi​α​bi​˙​L˙​

This paper is work on static network and our work is on dynamic network but we can still base on this.
We can see in this way we can keep the plasticity of our network and no need for initiative forget. So we can say this function is very neture.

entry.title: Dynamic structure network 2 -- What problems we are faceing at?
entry.content:
As the saying gose "To beat your enemy, you have to know your enemy".
So, what challenge we are faceing at?

  1. The catastrophic forget. This problem is often referred in incremental learning. When the new class input, the network will start a new training, but when the back propagation start, the network will soon find that old neurous parameter can't fit the new class. So the network will do it best to fit the new class data, it will couse the catastrophic forget (accurately it the properties of Rule function and Softmax function couse the catastrophic forget. I will discuss that in another article later). There are many papers about this problem, so I will discuss how should we deal this problem in another article.
  2. How network initialize. I have to say this is a new area that seems like no one have ever work on that. But it is a very important problem for my work. How we initialize it will decision how it will become. Many artificial neurou network using the layer structure, but I think the layer structure is very not "natural". So I think the really "natural" way is initialize network with graph structure. But another problem came, what kind of shape of the graph should we use? Layer have a very stable shape, we don't have to consider what kind of shape we should use, becouse there only one shape, and graph structure will couse some big trouble when programming. So, here comes some schemes, becouse the layer also a kind of graph in essence, so we can keep layer structure when initialize, then when the growth start, the shape will change naturelly. Another solution is random initilize a graph. I think both of them are desirable.
  3. How to keep the network's plasticity. Some paper said in human's brain, we use forget to keep the brain remember the new thing. It funny something we try to avoid may become a key to optimize our work. Initiative forget is a good direction I may watch some paper in this are later. I guess we should use a little bit of initiative forget when learning new class.
  4. How many kind of neurous we should use. This is a big topic, I will discuss that in another article.
  5. How should we make a back propagation in irregular network. Dynamic graph will couse a irregular network, it will very hard to make every neurous to follow a same rule when back propagaion, but if we make every neurou and connect have a single caculation will consumes a lot of computing resources.
  6. The input and output. How to deal with input data and output data is connect with last problem.
  7. How to decision when the neurous should increase and when to decrease. To deal with this problem, we should check every nuerou's active, and make the over active nuerou be keep and make the unactive nuerous decrease. Or another idea is just increase but not decrease, we make network running, when the unactive nuerous lower than a threshold the nuerous of our network will increase. This is also very tricky.
  8. Will graph become a network composition by many cluster? Maybe, I guess will.

entry.title: Dynamic structure network 1
entry.content:
The first paper I writen was about incremental leaning (But that was a sad story). So after that I have always think about one question: Can network naturaly increase class?
So I have read many paper in class incremental learning but there is one problem. It seem like everyone in this area all try to use a way to keep the information of old data than mix them with new data than make a new training of network (It called distiallation) rather than find a way to incremental network itself. Of course there are some work on change the network itself but as for my review the most close way is build a new network than find a way to connect the old one and the new one.
After that I have a tiny idea: can we make a dynamic network? The network will just like a graph but it can change struct when the new class data input. I guess I will try to work on this way. So just make this article as a perface.
